content: The leaders have asked for apologies from the countries that benefited from the slave trade, as well as debt relief and financial compensation.

title: Is the French judiciary against Palestine?

title: The beauty of sharing the first World Cup with your child
content: There is nothing like the first World Cup you can enjoy with your kid - and the wide-eyed wonder through which they see it.

title: All three England keepers played there - Carlisle's role in trio's rise
content: From west Cumbria to the World Cup, Carlisle is England's goalkeeper factory, with all of Thomas Tuchel's goalkeepers passing through the club.

originalTitle: Doku criticised over plan to return home for birth
title: A Football Star's Big Family Choice!
content:
Hello Friends! Meet Jeremy Doku!

Hello, hello, wonderful kids of Africa! Your friendly news reporter is here! Today, we have a very interesting story from the exciting world of football! You know football, right? The game where super-fast players kick a round ball into a net? It's one of our favourite games here in Africa and all around the world! Our story is about a super talented football player named Jeremy Doku. Can you say "Doku"? Great! Jeremy Doku plays for a country far away called Belgium. Belgium is in Europe, a continent across the sea. Jeremy is super good at running really fast with the ball. They call players like him a "winger" because they often play on the "wings" or sides of the football field. He helps his team score goals! Imagine a cheetah running with the ball – that's Jeremy!

The Big World Cup Dream!

Now, Jeremy Doku and his teammates from Belgium are getting ready for something super, super big! It's called the FIFA World Cup! The World Cup is a giant football party where teams from all over the world come to play and see who is the very best! **Did you know?** The World Cup happens only once every four years! It's super exciting because only the very best teams get to play. Everyone tries their hardest to win the big trophy! Right now, Jeremy is with his team in a special "camp." Think of it like a special school where all the players live, train, and practice together. They eat together, sleep there, and play football all day to get ready for their big matches. They want to win the World Cup! It's a very important time for Jeremy and his team. They practice very hard every day to be strong and ready for the big games against other countries. Everyone in Belgium is cheering for them to win!

A Very Special Family Moment

But guess what? Something even more special is happening in Jeremy Doku's family! His wife, who he loves very much, is going to have a baby! Yes, a brand new tiny baby! **Did you know?** When a baby is born, it's called "birth." It's one of the most exciting and happy days for a family! It's a day full of love and new beginnings. This will be Jeremy and his wife's very first child. Imagine holding a tiny baby for the first time! It's like magic. New babies need lots of gentle care and love from their mommy and daddy, especially when they are just born. In Africa, we know how important family is, right? When someone in our family has a baby, everyone gathers to celebrate and help. It's a time for joy and togetherness. Jeremy feels the same way about his family and his new baby.

Jeremy's Big Heart-Wish

So, Jeremy Doku has a big wish. He wants to leave his team's World Cup camp for a little while. Why? So he can be right there with his wife when their baby is born! He wants to be a daddy right from the very first moment. He wants to hold his wife's hand, give her courage, and be one of the first to welcome his tiny baby into the world. He wants to see his baby's first smile and feel their tiny fingers. It's a very big decision for Jeremy. On one side, he has his amazing football team and the World Cup dream, which is super important for any player. On the other side, he has his loving wife and their brand new baby, a moment he will never get back. What a choice! He told everyone that he wants to be there for his family. He believes that being a good husband and a good father is super, super important, maybe even more important than a football game, no matter how big.

What Are People Saying?

Now, this is where it gets a little tricky. When Jeremy said he wanted to go home, some people started talking about it. Some people "criticised" him. What does "criticised" mean? It means some people didn't agree with his idea. They said things like, "Oh no, Jeremy, you should stay with your team! The World Cup is too important!" It means they think he should make a different choice. These people think that because the World Cup is such a huge event, and his team needs him to play and win, he should put the football first. They believe that every player must stay with the team all the time, especially before such big, important games. They might think that if he leaves, even for a short time, it might make his team a little sad or feel like he's not fully committed to winning the trophy. But not everyone thinks this way! Many people understand his wish.

Family Love or Football Glory? A Tricky Choice!

So, we have two very strong ideas here, don't we? Some people think family always comes first, no matter what. They say, "A new baby is a once-in-a-lifetime moment! Jeremy should definitely be there!" They believe that family comes before anything else. They believe that being there for your family, especially your wife and new baby, is the most important job of all. It shows how much love he has in his heart and how much he cares about his family. But others think about the football team and the big dream of winning the World Cup. They might say, "Jeremy promised to play for his country! He should stay and help his team win!" They think he has a duty to his team. It's like when you have to choose between playing your favorite game with your friends and helping your mum with chores. Both are important, and it can be hard to pick! Jeremy is facing a similar big choice. **Did you know?** Many football players have families, and sometimes they miss important family events because of their games. It's a part of being a professional athlete, but it doesn't make it easy for them or their families!

What Happens Next?

This story reminds us that even famous football stars have to make tough choices, just like us. Jeremy Doku has a big heart, and he loves his family very much. He also loves playing football for his country and his team. We don't know yet exactly what Jeremy will do. Will he go home to welcome his baby, or will he stay with his team for the big games? It's a secret for now, and we'll have to wait to see his decision! No matter what he decides, we hope that his wife and new baby are safe and happy. And we also hope his team does very well in the World Cup because they have trained so hard! It's a story that makes us think about what is most important in our lives: our family, our dreams, and our responsibilities. What do you think is most important? Thank you for listening, wonderful kids! Keep cheering for your favourite teams and remember to always be kind to your family! Bye for now!
summary: A famous football player named Jeremy Doku wants to leave his team's big World Cup practice to be with his wife when she has their first baby, making some people wonder if family or football should come first.
whyMatters: This story helps us think about what is most important: being there for our family during special times, or helping our team with a big goal. It shows that even grown-ups have to make tough choices between things they love.
